title: Lucid Motors Saudi Arabia PIF Investment Strategy
text: Lucid Motors and Saudi Arabia's PIF Investment Strategy. Initial Investment and Foundation. In September 2018, Lucid Motors executed a US$1 billion+ investment agreement with the Public Investment Fund of Saudi Arabia (PIF). This funding provided capital to commercially launch Lucid's first electric vehicle, the Lucid Air in 2020. PIF's Strategic Objectives. The investment was part of PIF's International Investment Strategy to provide exposure to long-term growth opportunities in the rapidly expanding electric vehicle market and support innovation and technological development. Cumulative Investment. PIF and its affiliated entities have committed approximately $9.5 billion to Lucid since 2018. PIF remains Lucid's largest shareholder with a 50% stake. Recent Developments (2024-2026). In 2024, a PIF affiliate committed approximately $1 billion in a private placement, followed by a further $1.5 billion investment in August 2024. Most recently, Lucid announced an expansion of its partnership with Uber, with Ayar Third Investment Company (PIF affiliate) committing an additional $550 million.
